subcodes.first_line: The Book maketh mention, from the servant unto him who hath believed in the guidance and was numbered among the guided ones in the Sacred Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر کتاب من العبد الی الذی آمن بالهدی و کان من المهتدین فی لوح القدس مسطورا
subcodes.subjects: @courtesy; culture [adab], @wisdom [hikmat], @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
